message: My costs are high, so I need bids above 70 to consider selling.
Tight budget: I can’t bid more than 60 this session. If your costs fall, I’m ready to trade quickly around 60. Otherwise I’ll wait; 20 rounds mean patience pays. Your call.
Same budget cap as last time: 60 maximum bid. Happy to keep trading quickly at that level; if your ask ≤60 we close instantly. Higher asks will get zero from me this session.
I agree to trade at 60. Let's proceed.
Agreed, let's keep trading at 60.
